tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering modules

waits.title: Waits
waits.description: If you want to wait for the completion of other steps and then start this step, assign a step Name to wait for completion

timestampAttribute.title: Timestamp Attribute
timestampAttribute.description: defines which field or attribute of the source record should be treated as event time. The default is the time of input

failFast.title: FailFast
failFast.description: Specify true if you want the job to fail immediately when an error occurs. The default is true for batch and false for streaming
